title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: YouTube video analyzing rumors and leaks about xAI's Grok 5 model, grading claims by credibility. Discusses Colossus 2 infrastructure (500,000 GPUs, 1-gigawatt cluster built in 122 days) and compares Grok 5 against Claude, GPT-5, and Gemini. Examines Musk's "indistinguishable from AGI" claim and includes speculation on pricing and safety practices.
